Bumblebee (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $127,195,589Details
International Box Office $337,536,230
Worldwide Box Office $464,731,819
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,030,162
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $26,123,595
Total $39,153,757
Further financial details...

Synopsis

On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee finds refuge in a junkyard in a small Californian beach town. Charlie, on the cusp of turning 18 and trying to find her place in the world, discovers Bumblebee, battle-scarred and broken. When Charlie revives him, she quickly learns this is no ordinary, yellow VW bug.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,654,047 (17.0% of total gross)
Legs:5.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$102,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,550 opening theaters/3,597 max. theaters, 6.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $166,588,185

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2018 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 13th, 2018 (Wide), released as БАМБЛБИ (Russia (CIS))
December 14th, 2018 (Wide), released as Бъмбълби (Bulgaria)
December 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Mexico)
December 20th, 2018 (Wide) (Italy)
December 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
Video Release: April 2nd, 2019 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi action violence.
(Rating bulletin 2553 (Cert #51551), 11/14/2018)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Prequel, Prologue, Reboot
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Bullies, Friendly Alien on Earth, Mute, Robot, War, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Alien Invasion
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1980s
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: di Bonaventura Pictures, Paramount Pictures, Bay Films, Hasbro Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

On the run in the year 1987, Bumblebee finds refuge in a junkyard in a small Californian beach town. Charlie, on the cusp of turning 18 and trying to find her place in the world, discovers Bumblebee, battle-scarred and broken. When Charlie revives him, she quickly learns this is no ordinary, yellow VW bug.
